meta.title: How good is China's J-20 stealth fighter?
meta.description:
China's Chengdu J-20 Mighty Dragon was the world's first stealth aircraft to enter service that was designed outside of the United States. Here's a quick rundown on what we know. 

#short #shorts #j20 #airpower #defense #military #airpower #stealth #stealthfighter #f22 #f35 #su57
